# UI Implementation Checklist

## 1. Interpretation Of Documentation

- User journey and key states are extracted from BA docs.
- Ambiguities are listed as assumptions.
- Validation rules and error messages are mapped.

## 2. Layout And Components

- Page and component hierarchy is defined.
- Desktop and mobile breakpoints are covered.
- Empty/loading/error/success states are designed.

## 3. Interaction And State

- Client state model is explicit.
- Form and async interaction behaviors are defined.
- Edge interactions (timeouts, retries, partial failures) are handled.

## 4. Accessibility

- Semantic structure and keyboard navigation are supported.
- Color contrast and focus indicators are verified.
- Screen reader labels are present.

## 5. Integration Readiness

- API field mapping for UI is complete.
- Analytics events and tracking points are listed.
- Performance concerns (render cost, bundle impact) are reviewed.
